title: CRO Optimization: Why Your Healthcare Website Loses 97% of Visitors
metaDescription: Most healthcare websites convert under 3% of visitors. Learn how CRO optimization turns your existing traffic into booked appointments without spending more on ads.

bodyContent:
7 Conversion Killers on Healthcare Websites
Kevin
March 5, 2026 
No Comments
Healthcare websites often lose potential patients due to preventable design and usability mistakes. Learn the seven most common conversion killers and how to fix them.
Read more
